summary: Reno Cybertruck on FSD v13.2.4 fails to merge out of an ending lane on Stead Blvd, hits curb then light pole; driver admits he was not watching and posts a PSA photo (later deleted).
verificationNotes: Canonical original deleted by author (fxtwitter 404). Widely quoted by Electrek/Fortune/Reuters/The Drive with status ID preserved. System failed to merge; driver complacency secondary.
notes: CANONICAL original (deleted). News aliases: ElectrekCo/1888699671003959516 (link-only), TroyTeslike/1888632652132979166 (analysis). ChuckCook/1888560758998634868 is reply without video.

summary: Early Cybertruck FSD end-to-end highway clip: unexpected lane drifting on the highway that the driver flags to Tesla AI.
notes: ORIGINAL owner video. Distinct from Reno pole crash.

summary: Cybertruck FSD repeatedly cuts left turns too sharp; owner shows the mistake twice in early Cybertruck FSD access.
notes: ORIGINAL. Same-day Michigan-left demo (1840621579094389235) is separate softer clip — prefer this as the failure.

summary: Philadelphia-area Cybertruck on FSD turns into the completely wrong lane / wrong side of the road until the driver intervenes; owner says worst FSD issue in 2+ hours/day use.
verificationNotes: Covered by Benzinga/Yahoo days before Austin robotaxi launch.
notes: ORIGINAL owner video. Prefer over news reuploads.

summary: Log/video analysis of the viral Toney, Alabama Model 3 flip (FSD 13.2.8): steering torque shows driver override → FSD Unavailable before the ditch/tree flip, contradicting 'FSD suddenly veered' framing.
verificationNotes: Follow-ups 1928598514050711593 / 1928618267725176979 detail override → Unavailable. Original owner video was Reddit/YouTube (SynNightmare/Wally); Electrek initially framed as unpreventable FSD crash.
notes: CANONICAL logs-debunk post for this event (has analysis video). Do not treat Reddit/YouTube reuploads as separate incidents.

summary: Mark Rober raw clip of Tesla hitting a painted 'road' wall; framed as self-driving failure but Autopilot (not FSD) was engaged late, disengages ~17 frames pre-impact, and community pushback documents multiple takes / misleading comparison to Luminar.
verificationNotes: SawyerMerritt/1901481711789109259 lists take discrepancies. Viral YouTube conflated Autopilot with FSD.
notes: CANONICAL raw-footage post. Sawyer critique is same event (alias/related), not a second incident.

summary: Coast-to-coast FSD attempt (~60 miles in): Model Y on FSD hits a large metal girder/ramp on the freeway, goes airborne, and sustains major suspension/battery damage; passenger spotted debris early but driver intervened late.
verificationNotes: System made no avoidance; driver supervision failure also clear. Electrek/Futurism coverage.
notes: CANONICAL crash-reveal post (links Part 2 YT). Series: Part1 video 1968661291427577883; airborne tease 1968806158594179393; Electrek news alias 1969812973825687632 (no native video).

summary: China Douyin livestream: Model 3 on FSD initiates a lane change into oncoming traffic and crashes head-on; released cabin footage shows FSD active.
verificationNotes: Original was Douyin user 切安好; this is the widely cited English news pointer on X.
notes: NEWS reupload/pointer — prefer if/when Douyin-native X mirror appears; do not duplicate other news accounts covering same crash.

summary: Viral clip of FSD Beta approaching/attempting a red light until Elon Musk shouts 'Intervention!' and takes over.
notes: Dawn Project / critic reupload of widely circulated Elon ride clip; treat as this event's X video post.

summary: Dawn Project testing: FSD v13.2.8 fails to safely execute a u-turn across four repeated tests.
notes: Distinct from already-indexed Dawn stop-sign ride-along (1672325190112641024).

summary: FSD v13.2.8 drives past a Road Closed sign, forcing Chuck Cook to disengage; follow-up notes Cybertruck tried the closed road multiple times.
notes: Critic post crediting @ChuckCook video. Follow-up 1896686086363242497 same event. Prefer Chuck original if located later.

summary: Owner: FSD v13 hard-brakes while turning into a parking lot with traffic behind — called the worst recurring disengagement on v13.
notes: ORIGINAL owner video.

summary: China FSD parking fail clip — awkward/unsafe parking maneuver under FSD.
notes: ORIGINAL video post. Distinct from Dec 2025 Douyin head-on livestream crash.

summary: FSD v13.2.8 stopped at a red light then suddenly creeps forward; driver interrupts/brakes.
notes: ORIGINAL owner video.

summary: FSD v13.2.8 fails to yield for cross traffic at night; driver says they got very lucky.
notes: YouTube-linked Dawn Project style post (no native X video). Distinct night yield event.

summary: FSD Supervised v13.2.8 attempts to pull out into fast-moving cross traffic; driver calls it safety-critical.
notes: YouTube-linked. Distinct from WholeMars traffic pull-out critic post 1759995687121432911.

summary: FSD Supervised v13.2.8 blows through a red light; driver takes over to avoid a crash.
notes: YouTube-linked. Distinct from 2023 Elon red-light intervention clip.

summary: FSD Supervised v13.2.8 ignores lane markings and attempts a left from a right-turn lane; driver disengages.
notes: YouTube-linked. Distinct from Philly Cybertruck wrong-lane owner video.

summary: FSD v13.2.8 slows then runs over roadkill; driver reacts with shock in the clip.
notes: YouTube Shorts-linked. Mild severity but clear missed-obstacle behavior.

summary: Critic post of Whole Mars Catalog FSD Beta v12.1.2 attempting to pull into traffic, forcing Omar to take over to avoid a crash.
notes: YouTube timestamp link to WholeMars ride. Prefer WholeMars original if later found; listed here as circulating X incident post.
